subject: !!! Re: Love from Prague
body:
I guess....purity is easy here.. ;-)
How is your spirit keeping?
I know....the economy is definitely in very bad shape.
Would "green/Organic,sexy, arty clothing line represent "Hope" too???
We would start clothing and then skin care too.
U said tell me more. What U would like to know angel?
Sending BIG HUG!
Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra  

-----Original Message-----
From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Date: Sun, 20 Jul 2008 10:06:10 
To: <petranemcova@mac.com>
Subject: Re: Love from Prague


purity is easy here.. not sad at all,, tell me more.. the economy is so trouble in the states, you should take advantage of it.. you represent "hope.."  skincare, diet, something that any women can relate to, as she is so worriied about her life. Hope sells.


----- Original Message ----
From: "petranemcova@mac.com" <petranemcova@mac.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, July 19, 2008 5:09:56 AM
Subject: Re: Love from Prague

Yes, I'm!!! :-)
So wonderful to hear from UUUUU!!!!!! So it is OK to write now here???

1st....R U coping?
How R U feeling? What R U thinking???
I'm sure there is much learning happening?
How is the "purity project" going/ advancing? ;-)

Miss U!

U would be very proud of me!!!
I'm on holiday for 6 days with my family and then I'm taking my sister for surprise party in South of France! :-)
And before I was in Swiss land for few days relaxing!
All together 2 weeks of Holiday and then some work for few days and on 6th to Australia for my spiritual study for 10 days and then New Zealand for discovery trip for 1 week.
:-)
Nice??? Right? 
I been doing a lot cleaning "summer cleaning" in my life too!!!
And let some people go. And started with special email rules for time officency and productivity!
:-) ha ha 
And....
I started to see someone who can handle me ;-)
Ha ha...
Someone super smart so I think U would like him!
Studied at Cambridge and after his studies went to study also Astro Physics.
We have the same set of values and the same goal in life.
It is fresh...so we will see! :-)

I'm sorry....this probably will make U sad? :-(
I will send U something funny and crazy. 
:-)
Sending U BIGEST HUG!!!

Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra
